transcript.clean_text: the Sprint now is on Ys 34 seconds it will be Mark Mark will go out the winner of Parry welcome to Parise the first major stage race of the 2019 season on European soil it promises to be a fascinating 77th edition of the race to the sun with a host of the world's top sprinters and all-rounders coming along for the ride among them defending Champion Mark Solair part of a strong Mau star lineup it All Began on Sunday with a 138.5 km loop around sanjam anday to the west of Paris on paper not the trickiest stage but that was until the wind began to pick up this morning causing chaos an early casualty with sun webs Michael Matthews crashing out the Australian already saw his 2018 season upset by a broken shoulder in his first race three Frenchmen attacking from the off Amel Mo of te Mar samik Direct energies at damang G and Roman combo of Delo Mar provance along with vital concept BNB hotels AR Sami and Direct Energy will be battling it out for the two final Wild Card spots at this summer St of France expect all three teams to be trying to impress this week the leading Trio reeled in with under 50K to go but the strong wins were making it a tense Kon Riser with countless echelons plenty of splits and no shortage of spills another Delco Rider avadas cavius attacking on the code dull followed by Warren bargain and G the latter picking up four points at the summit to secure the first at King of the mountains Jersey bonus seconds up for grabs lat on with two intermediate Sprints 2009 winner Lis Lon Sanchez coming through the first ahead of Team Sky Duo Mel kovski and Egan Bal Sky have won five of the last seven editions of parin and they hit the front in the closing stages birthday boy Luke row leading KET kovski a tough day though for the defending Champion Solair losing a minute after being dropped by the front group polish road race champion KET kovski picking up three more bonus seconds at the second Sprint only 3K from the line the home stretch as straight as an arrow with jumbo visma hitting the front for dlan gragan Philip shil Bear's Late attack coming to nothing Sonny G brelli was the first to go but then gr ofan made his move the Dutchman a double stage winner on last year's Tour of France just getting to the line ahead of the charging Caleb huan so gr ofan taking the stage honors and the leaders yellow Jersey this is already a third win for the 25-year-old in 2019 after stage success is on the algar tour and the tour of Valencia it's also his second victory at parin after last year's second stage to vizon yeah there was a really really strong lead out from almun uh yeah then was Mike was going and on the right side lot of other Riders was going so yeah I going to the view and then I was going to to the line but I saw Kell coming but it was enough for for this victory yeah we have the yellow Jersey we have the victory yeah tomorrow is a new day first we we celebrate this Victory so Gan taking the stage one Victory as well as 10 bonus seconds ahead of yan and Fabio Jacobson Sam Bennett and John denen making up the top five with a lot of sprinters failing to make it through to contest the stage victory groven has four seconds on you overall but there's still a very long way to go in what's shaping up to be a spectacular Parise stage two sees the race that sweeps south from Li brevier to Belgard 163.5 km of mostly flat terrain with a couple more Category 3 climbs on the menu once again though the winds expected to wreak havoc only the hardiest Riders will make it through to contest the stage Victory thanks for watching and do join us again on Monday
